title: TATR Chandrapur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Tourism Manager and Visual Designer Posts
short_info: Tadoba-Andhari Tiger Reserve Chandrapur (TATR Chandrapur) Tourism Manager and Visual Designer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.mahaforest.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the TATR Chandrapur Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Degree in Design from a recognized institution, Mastery in design tools like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator), Figma or Sketch, Experience of working on a Govt. project
qualification.details: Tourism Manager: Graduate Visual Designer: 1. Degree in Design from a recognized institution. 2. Mastery in design tools like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator), Figma or Sketch. 3. Experience of working on a Govt. project

salary_details.details: Tourism Manager: Rs. 30,000/- (Negotiable) Per Month Visual Designer: Rs. 40,000/- (Negotiable) Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TATR Chandrapur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.mahaforest.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
